ground_truth.title: Workforce Training & Development
ground_truth.main_content:
At GSG Talent Solutions, we understand the importance of empowering individuals with the skills they need to succeed in today’s competitive job market. As a leading staffing firm in Austin, Texas, we offer comprehensive Austin workforce training programs that cater to diverse career paths. Each one is intentionally designed to meet the specific demands of the Central Texas job market, making it easier for aspiring professionals to succeed.

The Goodwill Excel Center Adult High School  
The Goodwill Excel Center Adult High School provides a unique opportunity for adults seeking to complete their high school education. This free public high school program is tailored to meet the needs of adult learners, offering flexible scheduling and personalized support.
Whether you’re looking to enhance your career prospects or fulfill personal goals, this program sets the foundation for success by offering a second chance at a diploma, which is often the first step toward career training in Central Texas.

The Goodwill Career & Technical Academy  
The Goodwill Career & Technical Academy (GCTA) is a premier Austin career education center. We offer specialized training and certification programs in the most in-demand roles within Central Texas, and each program is designed to provide experience and the necessary credentials to excel in your chosen field.  
Technology Training
In the rapidly evolving tech industry, staying current is essential. Our Technology training programs at GCTA prepare students by helping them gain in-demand skills today’s employers need. By offering formal certifications, we ensure our graduates are ready to excel in the Austin job market today, tomorrow, and beyond.
Medical Certifications
The healthcare sector continues to grow, and so does the demand for skilled professionals. GCTA offers certifications in various medical fields, including phlebotomy, medical coding, medical assistant, nursing assistant, and patient care technician. These programs are designed to provide the knowledge and practical skills needed to thrive in a medical career, making career training in Central Texas accessible and effective.
Project Management
Project management is a critical skill across many industries. Our project management training program equips students with the tools and methodologies necessary to lead projects successfully. With a focus on real-world applications, this certification helps professionals advance their careers in today’s dynamic work environment.
Skilled Trades
For those interested in the trades, GCTA offers training in construction, electrical, and plumbing certifications. These skilled trades are essential to the infrastructure of Central Texas, and our programs ensure that students are well-prepared to enter the workforce with confidence.
CDL Training
With the growing need for skilled drivers in Central Texas, this program is a direct path to a stable and rewarding career. Commercial drivers are in high demand, and our CDL training program is designed to meet this need. We provide comprehensive instruction that prepares students for the CDL exam and a successful career in transportation.
Working Hand-in-Hand with Local Employers and Professionals
At GSG Talent Solutions, we believe in the power of collaboration. We work closely with local employers to identify the skills most needed in the current job market. By aligning our training programs with these needs, we help candidates achieve ideal placements and build lifelong careers that match their aspirations and abilities. Our partnerships with professionals and businesses ensure that Austin career education center graduates are equipped with the skills that employers are looking for, making our training programs a valuable asset to the community.
Through our comprehensive Austin workforce training programs, GSG Talent Solutions is committed to enhancing the career prospects of individuals across Central Texas. Explore all of our training options to get your career moving in the right direction today.
